title: Google Sheets node requires a valid refresh token
symptom: When attempting to access a Google Sheet, n8n throws an error stating 'refreshToken is required'. This indicates an authentication issue preventing access to the sheet.
not_this_if: Error occurs with a different node
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n requires a valid refresh token to maintain the authentication session with Google Sheets. If the refresh token is missing, expired, or invalid, the connection cannot be established.
fix_steps: Ensure the Google Sheet is shared with the service account email or your Google account used in n8n.
Verify that the credentials include a valid refresh token.
If using a service account, check that the JSON key file is valid and not expired.
Double-check the sheet ID or document name for accuracy.
agent_instruction: Ensure the Google Sheet is shared correctly and verify the refresh token in your credentials.
